title: AnyFn
explanation: A generic function type for utilities that accept or return typed functions. Useful for memoize, debounce, throttle, and callback wrappers.
code: export type AnyFn<TArgs extends unknown[] = unknown[], TResult = unknown> = (...args: TArgs) => TResult;

title: VoidFn
explanation: A callback type for functions that do not return a useful value. Useful for event handlers, subscriptions, and side-effect functions.
code: export type VoidFn<TArgs extends unknown[] = unknown[]> = (...args: TArgs) => void;

title: AsyncFn
explanation: A generic promise-returning function type. Useful for retry helpers, API wrappers, async mappers, and background tasks.
code: export type AsyncFn<TArgs extends unknown[] = unknown[], TResult = unknown> = (...args: TArgs) => Promise<TResult>;
